learning_objective: Students compare energy sources across multiple criteria to evaluate trade-offs.
specification:
Type: microsim **sim-id:** energy-comparison-dashboard
**Library:** Chart.js
**Status:** Specified **Bloom Level:** Evaluate **Bloom Verb:** Compare **Learning Objective:** Students compare energy sources across multiple criteria to evaluate trade-offs. **Instructional Rationale:** Multi-criteria comparison builds systems thinking by showing that no energy source "wins" on every dimension -- trade-offs are inherent. Interactive radar chart comparing 8 energy sources (coal, natural gas, nuclear, solar PV, wind, hydroelectric, geothermal, biomass) across 6 dimensions: EROI, CO2 emissions (inverted so higher = cleaner), land use efficiency, reliability/capacity factor, cost per kWh (inverted so higher = cheaper), and scalability. Dropdown selector to highlight 2-3 sources for direct comparison. Data table below the chart shows actual values. Color-coded by energy type (fossil = amber, nuclear = purple, renewable = green shades).
